_publications._publicationTitle: Assessment of Mosaicism and Detection of Cryptic Alleles in CRISPR/Cas9-Engineered Neurofibromatosis Type 1 and

_contextSnippet: First, we used an in vitro validation assay utilizing LLC-PK1 cells to design and select the optimal genome editing reagents.
details: Successfully used for in vitro validation assay to design and select optimal genome editing reagents for NF1 targeting
